props.name: gridSize
props.description: The size of the grid (number of cubes per row/column)

props.name: cubeSize
props.description: Fixed size of each cube in pixels. If not provided, cubes will be responsive

props.name: maxAngle
props.description: Maximum rotation angle for the tilt effect in degrees

props.name: radius
props.description: Radius of the tilt effect (how many cubes around the cursor are affected)

props.name: easing
props.description: GSAP easing function for the tilt animation

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration for enter and leave effects

props.name: borderStyle
props.description: CSS border style for cube faces

props.name: autoAnimate
props.description: Whether to automatically animate when user is idle

props.name: rippleOnClick
props.description: Whether to show ripple effect on click

props.name: rippleSpeed
props.description: Speed multiplier for the ripple animation
